hooks.command: echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "SessionStart", "additionalContext": "**SUPERPOWERS PLUGIN ACTIVE:** superpowers@claude-plugins-official is loaded. You MUST invoke the Skill tool with skill=\"superpowers:using-superpowers\" before ANY response in this session — it defines how to find and use all other skills. Active skills — apply automatically without being asked: (1) brainstorming: before any new feature, component, or creative work; (2) concise-output: keep responses short and direct; (3) dispatching-parallel-agents: when 2+ tasks are independent, run them in parallel; (4) find-skills: when user asks how to do something that might have a skill; (5) model-selector: choose the right Claude model for task complexity; (6) planning-with-files: for complex tasks requiring >5 tool calls, create a plan file first; (7) realistic-testing: prefer real tests with real data over mocks; (8) reposynapse-explore: use reposynapse MCP tools first when exploring the codebase; (9) verification: after code changes, verify they work; (10) codigo-minimo: before writing any code, walk the minimum-code ladder (YAGNI → stdlib → native → installed dep → existing component → one line → minimum that works); never cut security, accessibility, or real error handling. TASK TRACKING (mandatory): For any task requiring more than 1 tool call, use TaskCreate to create tasks before starting, TaskUpdate to mark them in_progress as you begin each one, and TaskUpdate to mark them completed immediately when done. Keep the task list visible and current at all times — never batch completions at the end."}}'
